LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.label: Parasitism of nematodes
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.description: The colonist is parasitized by an Arachne nemesis, which if left uninterrupted will eventually kill the host and transform it into a mindless parasite. Nematodes infect other bodies through the parasite's aggressive behavior.
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.stages.0.label: Dormant period
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.stages.1.label: active period
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.stages.2.label: terminal stage
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematode.stages.3.label: About to convert
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.label: Arachne parasitoid
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.description: The corpse was infested and reanimated by a species of Arachnoid nematode. The parasitized creature is slow and mindless, and will relentlessly attack any living creature. After a few days of activity, the parasite will die due to metabolic exhaustion of the host. Once captured and immobilized, the parasite cannot move and therefore its life activities are suspended.
LanguageData.ARA_Rising.label: Getting up
LanguageData.ARA_Rising.description: The powerful regenerative ability conferred by the parasitism of Arachne is reviving this body.
This body had just been "resurrected" by the parasitism of Arachne.
